phase: consumed-development causal stacked meta-label and live-capacity viability screen

predecessor.finding: Monthly refits restored activity but all four full candidates remained negative after costs. An outcome-blind confidence-ranked AI sample looked stronger, but completed-month ranking is unavailable to a live controller and therefore cannot become policy.

roles_per_evaluation_month.base_training: 15 complete calendar months ending four months before evaluation
roles_per_evaluation_month.base_early_stop_and_temperature: third complete calendar month before evaluation
roles_per_evaluation_month.meta_fit: first 20 UTC days of the second complete calendar month before evaluation, with target-horizon embargo
roles_per_evaluation_month.meta_early_stop: remaining UTC days of the second complete calendar month before evaluation, with target-horizon embargo
roles_per_evaluation_month.capacity_threshold_calibration: complete calendar month immediately before evaluation

target_and_accounting_contract.entry_price: USD-M perpetual open of minute t+1
target_and_accounting_contract.exit_price: USD-M perpetual open exactly 30 minutes after entry
target_and_accounting_contract.meta_target: one only when the primary model's proposed side has exact net utility above zero after the frozen charge and funding cash flow

primary_model.architecture: three per-symbol direct multiclass LightGBM models per evaluation month
primary_model.proposal_side: argmax between calibrated short and long probability; abstain probability remains a meta feature
primary_model.backend: OpenCL LightGBM with CPU fallback only when explicitly requested

meta_label_model.architecture: one shared binary LightGBM profitability classifier per evaluation month
meta_label_model.training_rows: strictly out-of-sample primary proposals from meta_fit
meta_label_model.early_stop_rows: later strictly out-of-sample primary proposals from meta_early_stop
features: calibrated primary short abstain and long probabilities
proposed side encoded as minus one or plus one
meta_label_model.backend: OpenCL LightGBM with CPU fallback only when explicitly requested

causal_capacity_and_threshold_contract.capacity_selection: accept the first threshold-crossing proposals in timestamp order until the daily symbol budget is exhausted
causal_capacity_and_threshold_contract.no_passing_threshold_action: route no evaluation actions for that month and record fail-closed abstention

aggregate_viability_gate.failure_action: reject without accessing 2025-H2 or 2026 and do not run the expensive AI ablation

ai_ablation_contract.provider: local Ollama or llama.cpp compatible GGUF
ai_ablation_contract.selection_reason: open MIT-licensed finance-reasoning model; benchmark scope is financial reasoning rather than market prediction, so uplift must be demonstrated here
ai_ablation_contract.case_sampling: chronological deployable ML actions; deterministic case-id hash sampling independent of outcomes, truncated only after 180 cases
prompt_must_not_include: future return funding or trade outcome
calendar date or exact price level

required_outputs: six explicit monthly role schedules and embargo counts
18 primary and 6 meta model artifacts with reload identity
primary and meta class balance and prediction-quality evidence
monthly and aggregate nonoverlapping exact-net replays
daily capacity usage and rejection counts by symbol
symbol month funding and loss-streak attribution
AI model prompt response and matched uplift evidence only after the ML gate

research_basis.title: Trading via Selective Classification
research_basis.use: supports learned abstention and walk-forward selective classification

research_basis.title: Machine Learning-Based Bitcoin Trading Under Transaction Costs: Evidence From Walk-Forward Forecasting
research_basis.use: supports explicit cost-aware execution filtering instead of naive sign routing

research_basis.title: Backtest Overfitting in the Machine Learning Era
research_basis.use: requires treating this repeated consumed-period walk-forward as development evidence, not independent confirmation

research_basis.title: DianJin-R1: Evaluating and Enhancing Financial Reasoning in Large Language Models
research_basis.use: documents the candidate 8B finance-reasoning model but does not establish trading edge

research_basis.title: LightGBM 4.6 Parameters
research_basis.use: defines the GPU-capable multiclass and binary objectives used by the frozen stack
